channel.title: 你好，我是潘王雨昂 on Panwang Yuang
channel.description: Recent content in 你好，我是潘王雨昂 on Panwang Yuang

item.title: Chapter VI: Esmeralda
item.description: We are delighted to be able to inform the reader, that during the whole of this scene, Gringoire and his piece had stood firm. His actors, spurred on by him, had not ceased to spout his comedy, and he had not ceased to listen to it. He had made up his mind about the tumult, and was determined to proceed to the end, not giving up the hope of a return of attention on the part of the public.

item.title: Chapter V: Quasimodo
item.description: In the twinkling of an eye, all was ready to execute Coppenole’s idea. Bourgeois, scholars and law clerks all set to work. The little chapel situated opposite the marble table was selected for the scene of the grinning match. A pane broken in the pretty rose window above the door, left free a circle of stone through which it was agreed that the competitors should thrust their heads. In order to reach it, it was only necessary to mount upon a couple of hogsheads, which had been produced from I know not where, and perched one upon the other, after a fashion.

item.title: Chapter IV: Master Jacques Coppenole
item.description: While the pensioner of Ghent and his eminence were exchanging very low bows and a few words in voices still lower, a man of lofty stature, with a large face and broad shoulders, presented himself, in order to enter abreast with Guillaume Rym; one would have pronounced him a bull-dog by the side of a fox. His felt doublet and leather jerkin made a spot on the velvet and silk which surrounded him.

item.title: Chapter III: Monsieur the Cardinal
item.description: Poor Gringoire! the din of all the great double petards of the Saint-Jean, the discharge of twenty arquebuses on supports, the detonation of that famous serpentine of the Tower of Billy, which, during the siege of Paris, on Sunday, the twenty-sixth of September, 1465, killed seven Burgundians at one blow, the explosion of all the powder stored at the gate of the Temple, would have rent his ears less rudely at that solemn and dramatic moment, than these few words, which fell from the lips of the usher, “His eminence, Monseigneur the Cardinal de Bourbon.

item.title: Chapter II: Pierre Gringoire
item.description: Nevertheless, as be harangued them, the satisfaction and admiration unanimously excited by his costume were dissipated by his words; and when he reached that untoward conclusion: “As soon as his illustrious eminence, the cardinal, arrives, we will begin,” his voice was drowned in a thunder of hooting. “Begin instantly! The mystery! the mystery immediately!” shrieked the people. And above all the voices, that of Johannes de Molendino was audible, piercing the uproar like the fife’s derisive serenade: “Commence instantly!

item.title: Chapter I: The Grand Hall
item.description: Three hundred and forty-eight years, six months, and nineteen days ago to-day, the Parisians awoke to the sound of all the bells in the triple circuit of the city, the university, and the town ringing a full peal. The sixth of January, 1482, is not, however, a day of which history has preserved the memory. There was nothing notable in the event which thus set the bells and the bourgeois of Paris in a ferment from early morning.

item.title: 关于我
item.description: 教育经历 2021-2024 厦门大学管理学 技术经济及管理 (3.9/4.0, 1/10) 2016-2020 南开大学经济学院 管理学学士 (88.2/100, 前25%) 2016-2020 南开大学周恩来政府管理学院 政治学学士 (双学位) 工作论文(此部分文件待更新) Yuwen Xuan, Panwang Yuang, 2022. Systematic Review Of HLM Model in Public Administration (Updated in Dec.) Panwang Yuang, Hu Jian, 2022. What Doesn’t Kill You, Makes You More Myopic? –Famine Experience and Managerial Myopia (Updated in Nov.) Panwang Yuang, 2022. The Ups and Downs of Bureaucrat Capitalism:The Anti-Corruption in China’s Land Market and Firms’ Efficiency (Updated in Oct.

item.title: 资源汇总
item.description: tips：如果在连上了个人主页时科学上网了，在下载时是可以取消的哦~ 目录 1. 计量经济学学习资料 2. 数据分析类学习资料 1. 计量经济学学习资料 资料包括: 陈强, 2014. 高级计量经济学及Stata应用[M]. 第二版. 高等教育出版社.（包括所有数据文件） 陈诗一，陈登科, 2019. 计量经济学[M]. 高等教育出版社. 洪永淼, 2011. 高级计量经济学[M]. 赵西亮, 吴吉林, 译. 高等教育出版社. 洪永淼, 2017. 概率论与统计学[M]. 中国统计出版社. 李子奈, 潘文卿, 2015. 计量经济学[M]. 第四版. 高等教育出版社.（包括圣才笔记和课本） 庞皓, 2019. 计量经济学[M]. 第四版. 科学出版社.（只有圣才笔记） 乔舒亚·安格里斯特, 约恩·斯特芬·皮施克, 2012. 基本无害的计量经济学[M]. 郎金焕, 李井奎, 译. 格致出版社. 邱嘉平, 2020. 因果推断实用计量方法[M]. 上海财经大学出版社. 威廉·H.格林, 2020. 计量经济分析[M]. 张成思, 译. 第八版. 中国人民大学出版社.（包括课后习题答案） 赵西亮, 2017. 基本有用的计量经济学[M]. 北京大学出版社. Wooldridge J M, 2018. 计量经济学导论[M]. 张成思, 译.
